summary: Complete testing of Admin/Chauffeur authentication system. All 20 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend flows working correctly. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in admin creation endpoint.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/check returns has_admins status
Backend: POST /api/admin/init creates default admin if none exists
Backend: POST /api/admin/login with correct credentials returns JWT token
Backend: POST /api/admin/login with wrong password returns 401
Backend: POST /api/admin/login with non-existent email returns 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/me with valid token returns admin info
Backend: GET /api/admin/me without token returns 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/me with invalid token returns 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/list returns list of admins (without password_hash)
Backend: GET /api/admin/list requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/admin/create creates new admin successfully
Backend: POST /api/admin/create with duplicate email returns 400
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/{id} deletes admin and verifies removal
Backend: PUT /api/admin/{id}/toggle-active toggles admin status
Backend: POST /api/chauffeur/login with valid code returns session
Backend: POST /api/chauffeur/login with invalid code returns 401
Backend: GET /api/chauffeur/{id}/chantiers returns chauffeur's chantiers
Backend: Protected admin endpoints require authentication
Frontend: Landing page (/) shows Admin and Chauffeur choice cards
Frontend: Click Admin card navigates to /admin/login
Frontend: Admin login form has email, password inputs and submit button
Frontend: Admin login with correct credentials redirects to /admin dashboard
Frontend: Admin dashboard shows welcome message with admin name
Frontend: Admin menu shows admin initials and name
Frontend: Navigate to /admin/administrateurs shows admin list
Frontend: Administrateurs page shows 'Vous' badge for current admin
Frontend: Admin logout redirects to landing page
Frontend: Click Chauffeur card navigates to /chauffeur/login
Frontend: Chauffeur login form has code input and submit button
Frontend: Chauffeur login with invalid code shows error toast
Frontend: Chauffeur login with valid code redirects to /chauffeur/portal
Frontend: Chauffeur portal shows welcome message with chauffeur name
Frontend: Chauffeur portal has pointage form with all fields
Frontend: Chauffeur logout redirects to landing page
Frontend: Access /admin without auth redirects to /admin/login
Frontend: Access /chauffeur/portal without auth redirects to /chauffeur/login
Frontend: Access /admin/administrateurs without auth redirects to /admin/login
Frontend: Admin creation dialog opens with all form fields
Frontend: Admin creation with valid data shows success toast
Frontend: New admin appears in list after creation

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error in admin creation - insert_one adds _id to dict which is not JSON serializable
bugs_fixed.fix: Added deletion of _id from admin_dict before returning: if '_id' in admin_dict: del admin_dict['_id']

seed_data_creation: Test admins created during testing were cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Authentication system fully working. Admin auth uses JWT with 24h expiration stored in localStorage as 'admin_token'. Chauffeur auth uses simple token stored in localStorage as 'chauffeur_session'. Routes are protected via Layout component for admin and ChauffeurPortal component for chauffeur. Default admin credentials: r.coisnon@terredebeauce.com / Mennessard03. Chauffeur codes are auto-generated when creating chauffeurs.
